name: conceptual-plugins-marketplace
description: Claude Code marketplace for Google Ads, banking, and productivity tools

plugins.name: google-ads
plugins.description: Google Ads API management — campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, budgets, bidding strategies, conversions, audiences, assets, and GAQL reporting via the Google Ads REST API v23.

plugins.name: mercury
plugins.description: Mercury Bank API — accounts, transactions, statements, cards, recipients, and send-money (ACH, wire, check) via the Mercury API v1. Uses MERCURY_API_KEY env var.

plugins.name: stripe
plugins.description: Stripe API v1 — customers, charges, payment intents, subscriptions, invoices, products, prices, balance, payouts, refunds, disputes, events, and checkout sessions. Reads and writes. Uses STRIPE_API_KEY env var.

plugins.name: chase
plugins.description: Chase bank account access via Plaid (Chase does not expose a direct public API). Reads: accounts, balances, transactions, identity, ACH routing. Writes (Plaid Transfer) require Plaid enablement. Uses PLAID_CLIENT_ID/PLAID_SECRET/PLAID_ACCESS_TOKEN env vars.

plugins.name: figma-ad-designer
plugins.description: AI ad design assistant. Creates production-ready Meta and Google Ads in Figma via figma-remote-mcp. Supports 1:1, 4:5, 9:16, and 1.91:1 with brand integration and QA review.
